sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n114360" key="xoloibo/ros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χολοι-βόρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n114360.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">eating like bile,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἰός</foreign> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0022.tlg001:593" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">593</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
